description: Sprouts.ai provides an AI-driven account-based marketing and go-to-market platform for B2B sales and marketing teams. Its product documentation describes platform features such as account intelligence, CRM sync, and website visitor tracking.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found for sprouts.ai: the site exposes product and user-guide pages, but no public HTTP/REST API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI on sprouts.ai subdomains.
